_meta.definition: The set of activities related to managing the media catalog, including registration, updates, and categorization.

columns.name: film_id
columns.description: Primary key uniquely identifying each row in film

columns.name: title
columns.description: Stores up to 50 characters of film titles, such as ACADEMY DINOSAUR, ACE GOLDFINGER, etc.

columns.name: description
columns.description: Stores brief narrative summaries of film plots.
samples: A Epic Drama of a Feminist And a Mad Scientist who must Battle a Teacher in The Canadian Rockies
A Astounding Epistle of a Database Administrator And a Explorer who must Find a Car in Ancient China
A Astounding Reflection of a Lumberjack And a Car who must Sink a Lumberjack in A Baloon Factory
A Fanciful Documentary of a Frisbee And a Lumberjack who must Chase a Monkey in A Shark Tank
A Fast-Paced Documentary of a Pastry Chef And a Dentist who must Pursue a Forensic Psychologist in The Gulf of Mexico

columns.name: release_year
columns.description: Stores the year of release for films, all shown examples are from 2006.

columns.name: language_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the language_ entity

columns.name: original_language_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the original_language_ entity

columns.name: rental_duration
columns.description: Stores the number of days a film can be rented.

columns.name: rental_rate
columns.description: Stores the rental cost for each film title in the Sakila database.

columns.name: replacement_cost
columns.description: Stores the price for replacing a film title.

columns.name: rating
columns.description: Stores film ratings, such as PG, G, NC-17.

columns.name: special_features
columns.description: Stores additional features of films such as deleted scenes, behind-the-scenes footage, trailers, and commentaries.

columns.name: last_update
columns.description: Stores the timestamp of the last update for each film record.

columns.name: language_id
columns.description: Primary key uniquely identifying each row in language

columns.name: name
columns.description: Stores the 10-character name of a language (e.g., English, Italian, Japanese, Mandarin, French).

columns.name: last_update
columns.description: The "language" table's "last_update" column stores timestamps for when each language record was last updated.
